summary: ProposalView.jsx redesign testing - PASSED. All core features working as expected. Tested with existing proposal (Trip to Tbilisi, 3 nights). Breadcrumb navigation, proposal header, sticky tab navigation, day-by-day itinerary, expand/collapse days, inclusions, terms, messages, and help sections all functional.

issues: Hotel card not displayed as proposal doesn't have selected_hotels data - this is a data issue, not a UI bug. The component correctly handles missing hotel gracefully.

proposal_view_page_loads.details: Page loads correctly when clicking 'View Proposal' from My Proposals

breadcrumb_navigation.details: Displays 'Lead Details > View All Suggested Options > Proposal Name' breadcrumb correctly

edit_proposal_button.details: EDIT PROPOSAL button visible in sticky tab bar

google_map.details: Map loads correctly for Tbilisi showing city location

flights_section.details: Shows 'Dubai International Airport (DXB) to Tbilisi' and 'No Flight Included'

hotel_card.details: Test proposal does not have selected_hotels data. Component handles missing hotel gracefully - section simply not displayed

what_to_know_section.details: Requires hotel to be selected to display

expand_all_days_button.details: Button works - expands all days and text changes to 'COLLAPSE ALL DAYS'. Collapse also works.

elements_displayed: Orange alert banner: 'Arrival information is missing'
Transfer info with 'Private Transfers' badge and '3 Bags' badge

day_2_3_leisure.details: Shows 'Tbilisi - Day at leisure' with date range and description

elements_displayed: Pink alert banner: 'Departure information is missing'

sections_displayed: Transfers with dates and 'Private Transfers' badge
Exclusions list with all bullet points

travel_insurance_section.details: Shows 'Travel Insurance with min $50,000 coverage - Only for Age Below 60 Yrs' with 'Not Included' in red

exclusions_list.details: All exclusion bullet points displayed correctly including the blue link at bottom

back_to_proposals_button.details: Button navigates back to My Proposals tab correctly

critical_code_review_comments: ProposalView.jsx handles missing hotel data gracefully - no errors when selected_hotels is empty
Tab navigation uses data-testid attributes correctly
EXPAND ALL DAYS toggle works correctly with state management
Alert banners for arrival/departure use appropriate colors (orange/pink)
All interactive elements have proper hover states
seed_data_creation: None - used existing proposal (Trip to Tbilisi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProposalView.jsx redesign complete and tested. Test flow: Login (test@example.com/test123) -> My Leads -> My Proposals -> View Proposal. All tabs work correctly. Note: Current test proposal doesn't have hotel selected so Hotel card section is not visible. To fully test Hotel card and 'What to know about this hotel' sections, a proposal with selected hotel would be needed.

features_not_testable_due_to_data: Hotel card display (requires selected_hotels in proposal data)
What to know about this hotel section (requires hotel selection)
